threats.title: 36 Malicious npm Packages Exploited Redis, PostgreSQL to Deploy Persistent Implants
threats.summary: Cybersecurity researchers have discovered 36 malicious packages in the npm registry that are disguised as Strapi CMS plugins but come with different payloads to facilitate Redis and PostgreSQL exploitation, deploy reverse shells, harvest credentials, and drop a persistent implant. threats.title: Fortinet Patches Actively Exploited CVE-2026-35616 in FortiClient EMS
threats.summary: Fortinet has released out-of-band patches for a critical security flaw impacting FortiClient EMS that it said has been exploited in the wild. The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-35616 (CVSS score: 9.1), has been described as a pre-authentication API access bypass leading to privilege escalation. threats.title: China-Linked TA416 Targets European Governments with PlugX and OAuth-Based Phishing
threats.summary: A China-aligned threat actor has set its sights on European government and diplomatic organizations since mid-2025, following a two-year period of minimal targeting in the region. threats.title: Microsoft Details Cookie-Controlled PHP Web Shells Persisting via Cron on Linux Servers
